query: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM station_tasks b WHERE b.productId = p.id AND b.stationCode = 'B' AND b.stationTaskStatus = 'completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hasBCompleted, SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM station_tasks c WHERE c.productId = p.id AND c.stationCode = 'C' AND c.stationTaskStatus = 'completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hasCCompleted, SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM station_tasks s WHERE s.productId = p.id AND s.stationCode = 'STOCK' AND s.stationTaskStatus = 'pending') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingStock, SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM station_tasks s2 WHERE s2.productId = p.id AND s2.stationCode = 'STOCK') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS everInStock FROM products p WHERE p.archivedAt IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM station_tasks b WHERE b.productId = p.id AND b.stationCode = 'B' AND b.stationTaskStatus = 'completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hasBCompleted, SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM station_tasks c WHERE c.productId = p.id AND c.stationCode = 'C' AND c.stationTaskStatus = 'completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hasCCompleted, SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM station_tasks s WHERE s.productId = p.id AND s.stationCode = 'STOCK' AND s.stationTaskStatus = 'pending') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingStock, SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM station_tasks s2 WHERE s2.productId = p.id AND s2.stationCode = 'STOCK') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS everInStock FROM products p WHERE p.archivedAt IS NULL;
